channel.title: What about a Canadien Site?
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "What about a Canadien Site?"

item.title: Re: What about a Canadien Site?
item.content:encoded:
The sites are based on language, not nationality. English-speaking Canadian users would be most at home on -EN, while primarily-French-speaking Canadians would likely be more comfortable on -FR. There is absolutely no reason to institute a "Canadian Branch" when the major official languages1 are covered already.

There is nothing stopping someone from writing Canada-based content here, on -FR, or, indeed, on literally any of the wikis.

Footnotes
1. Can't speak for the First Nations' languages. If someone fluent wants to create a site for those, that'd be neat.

item.title: What about a Canadien Site?
item.content:encoded: Hey! So I have seen that there's a Site for (almost) all languages, and I wonder if a country such as Canada or the United Kingdom could have their own Site or a type of SCP/Goi/Canon for them. I know that the other Sites are basically just translation, but it could make people from America wanna see Goi Canadien and England, and after that, they could be curious to see other translations of Sites such as Japan, China, France, German, Russian, Korean Ect.
